case_title: MURPHY INVESTMENTS VS. LUIS SOBREVILLA et al

HEARING ON APPLICANT/LUIS SOBREVILLA'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE FOR ADDITIONAL WAIVER DENIED. LUIS SOBREVILLA HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AND COURT REPORTERS' FEES SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR# 4780 (206)
